iframes.title: Script Iframes
iframes.warning: Embed your web tools (CRM, calculator, payment form) into the script. The target site must allow embedding (X-Frame-Options / Content-Security-Policy headers) and use HTTPS — otherwise the iframe will stay blank during the call. Test each URL before validating.

ui.errorPhaseData: Error: Phase data not found. Please try refreshing the page.
ui.accessibleDesc: Follow the sequence to complete your company setup and unlock premium features.
ui.lockedDesc: This phase is currently locked. Please complete the previous phase to continue.
ui.allPhasesCompleted: All steps in this phase are completed. Congratulations, all onboarding phases are now successfully completed! 👏🎺🎊
ui.phaseCompleted: All steps in this phase are completed. You can proceed to the next phase.
ui.nextStepHint: Step complete! Move to the next one.
ui.unableToStart:
Unable to start this step because previous phases are not fully completed. 

Please try the 'Reset Onboarding' button at the bottom of the page to fix potential data inconsistencies.

stepGuide.insideHint: Complete the fields below, then return to onboarding when you're done.

step1.beforeDescription: This is the foundation of your HARX account: a clean, complete company profile that your REPs and leads will see. It takes less than 2 minutes — pick the mode that fits your situation.
step1.insideDescription: Type your company name, paste a website URL, or create the profile manually. Everything is editable before publishing.
step1.modesLabel: Three ways to create your profile

search.title: Search by name
search.desc: Type the company name — AI finds it on the web and pre-fills everything.

scrape.title: Paste a website URL
scrape.desc: We scrape the page to extract phone, social media and contact info.

manual.title: Create manually
manual.desc: No website? Use the form to enter all details yourself, with logo upload.

before: You only need the company name OR its website to start.
Every field can be edited before publishing.
Logo, mission and contact info are auto-filled when possible.
inside: Click "Edit" on any field once the profile loads to refine it.
For better contact extraction, paste the company website rather than just its name.
You can switch to manual creation any time using the floating button.

logo.dropOrClick: Drop your logo here or click to upload
logo.tooBig: Image must be smaller than 5 MB.

logo.fallbackPasteUrl: Cloudinary is not configured — paste an image URL below.

placeholders.overview: Describe the company, what it does, and its market…

guide.title: Build your company profile manually
guide.intro: Use this mode when you don't have a website yet, or when search and scraping miss your company. Fill in what you know — you can polish the rest later.
guide.cta: Got it, let's fill the form

basics.title: Start with the essentials
basics.desc: Company name, industry, founding year and headquarters help us position you correctly when matching reps and gigs.

logo.title: Upload a clean logo
logo.desc: Drop a transparent PNG or SVG (max 5 MB). Your logo appears on the dashboard, scripts, and rep-facing screens.

story.title: Tell your story
story.desc: A short overview and a clear mission give the AI enough context to draft accurate gigs, scripts and rep onboarding kits.

contact.title: Add reachable contacts
contact.desc: Pro email, phone and social links are reused later for sales pages, lead routing and trust signals.

tips.0: Only Company name and Overview are required — everything else can be added later.
tips.1: You can come back at any time to refine the profile from the company dashboard.
tips.2: If you have a website, prefer the URL mode in the previous screen — it auto-fills most fields for you.

errors.publishFailed: Failed to publish company. Please try again.

autoVerification.businessDesc: Verify your business through official registries and databases automatically.

steps.step2: Ensure good lighting for photo capture

guidelines.guide1: All documents must be clear and legible

help.title: Need Assistance?

intro.title: Ready to orchestrate your operations{{name}}?
intro.description: The HARX Orchestrator helps you set up your company, create gigs, match reps, and launch your sales operations — all in one place.

1.title: Company Onboarding
1.description: Complete your company profile, KYC verification, telephony setup, and call scripts. This is your foundation for everything else.

2.title: Gigs & Matching
2.description: Create AI-powered gigs, define requirements, and let our algorithm match the best HARX reps to your campaigns.

3.title: Training & Knowledge Base
3.description: Build training journeys, upload knowledge base documents, and prepare your reps for success before they hit the phones.
